theme_rankings.why_now: HBM4·CoWoS·EUV 모두 캐파 부족 지속. 2027까지 수요 가시성 확보된 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 정점 논쟁 + 중국 수출 규제 변동성. 어닝 미스 시 30% 낙폭 흔함.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🚂 AI의 '밴더빌트' — 실제 업무에 AI 박는 운영자
theme_rankings.why_now: 추론 비용 90% 하락 + 엔터프라이즈 도입 본격. 진짜 텐베거 후보가 여기서 다수.
theme_rankings.risk: 밸류에이션 과열. 매출 성장 30%+ 못 보이면 멀티플 압축.

theme_rankings.why_now: 강한 추세장에서만 사용. 분할매수 + 손절선 명확히 + 자산의 5~10% 이하.
theme_rankings.risk: 장기 보유 ❌. 횡보·하락장에선 음의 복리(volatility decay)로 손실 누적.

theme_rankings.why_now: MSFT·GOOG·META·AMZN 2026 Capex 합계 $400B+. AI 매출 회수 본격화 단계.
theme_rankings.risk: 광고·소비 둔화 시 Capex 가이던스 컷 가능. 빅테크 동반 변동성.

theme_rankings.why_now: 인지노동 다음은 물리노동. 2027~2030 진정한 텐베거 가능 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 상용화 시점 불확실. 미래 옵션밸류 비중 큼. 변동성 극심.

theme_rankings.why_now: AI가 돌아가려면 전기 필요. 미국 변압기 대기 100주+ → 만드는 회사들 5년치 일감 확보.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 후반 진입 우려는 아직 작지만, 금리 급등 시 인프라주 동반 조정.

verdicts.name: Super Micro
verdicts.note: AI 서버 OEM, NVDA 출하 직접 지표
verdicts.label: ACCUMULATE

narrative.summary: Super Micro: 정량 종합 71점, 라벨 ACCUMULATE. 단기 62 / 중기 69 / 장기 78. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)
narrative.entry_guide: API 키 미설정 — 진입 가이드 자동 생성 불가
narrative.risks: LLM 서술 미생성. 정량 점수만 참고할 것

overheat.label: 약과열
overheat.guidance: 분할매수만. 한 번에 들어가지 말고 1/3~1/2씩 나눠서.

guidance.basis: ATR(14) 7.2% → 2-ATR 손절폭 14.4%. 포트폴리오의 1%만 risk-on (1번 손절 = 자산 1% 손실).

trade_plan.rationale: 진입 zone에 4개 시그널 합류 — Value Area High, Fib 0.618, Swing High. 현재가 대비 +2.1% 위치. T1 $36.08 (R:R 0.3), T2 $38 (R:R 0.8)
trade_plan.invalidation: 진입가 $34.82 아래 손절가 $30.64 일봉 종가 마감 시 plan 폐기.

narrative.summary: Micron: 정량 종합 67점, 라벨 ACCUMULATE. 단기 53 / 중기 68 / 장기 76. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)

top_news.title: AEW CEO on WWE Challenger’s Biggest Test in New York
top_news.summary: All Elite Wrestling CEO Tony Khan discusses the future of AEW. He discusses his upcoming event, and how he plans to promote his league in the future. He speaks with Romaine Bostick on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Equatorial Leans Against Bidding on Copasa Privatization
top_news.summary: Equatorial SA is unlikely to bid on a key stake in Copasa, the Brazilian water utility that’s being privatized by the government of Minas Gerais state, according to people familiar to the matter.

top_news.title: Grocery Stores Feel Crunch of Fuel, Labor Costs Ahead of Memorial Day
top_news.summary: Stew Leonard Jr., president and CEO of Stew Leonard's, said that customers are still buying food ahead of Memorial Day celebrations, but they're also complaining about the squeeze they feel when they go to the store. Leonard said that while he believes fuel prices will eventually come down once conflict in the Middle East is resolved, labor costs for the store will remain high, making it difficult to keep prices from going up.  (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Nasdaq Gets Approval From SEC to List Bitcoin Index Options
top_news.summary: The Securities and Exchange Commission has given the go-ahead for Nasdaq Inc. to list index options based on the price of Bitcoin, the latest sign that Wall Street is becoming more tightly integrated with the world of digital assets.

top_news.title: Lantheus Explores Potential $7 Billion Sale Following Offer From Curium
top_news.summary: Lantheus Holdings Inc. is weighing a sale after getting a takeover offer from Curium that values the radiopharma company at about $7 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.

top_news.title: S&P 500 Posts Eighth Weekly Gain as AI Stocks Power Rally
top_news.summary: US stocks advanced, notching gains ahead of a long holiday weekend fueled by hopes for resolution of hostilities in the Middle East and relentless enthusiasm for artificial intelligence-linked trades.

top_news.title: Dollar Stalls as US-Iran Peace Hopes Boost Risk Sentiment
top_news.summary: The dollar ended the week nearly unchanged as risk assets got a boost tied to optimism around progress in peace talks between the US and Iran.

top_news.title: S&P 500 Bulls Power Longest Weekly Gain Since 2023: Markets Wrap
top_news.summary: Hopes for a deal between the US and Iran that will turn a fragile ceasefire into lasting peace fueled Wall Street optimism, driving stocks to their longest streak of weekly gains since 2023.

top_news.title: Muni Bond Sales Surge in 2026
top_news.summary: Bloomberg's Aashah Shah joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Real Yield." May has been a strong month for muni bond issuance, with about $35 billion of sales so far this year. This month has seen the most debt for a similar period in May since at least 2015, Bloomberg data show. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Credit Entry Points Incredibly Attractive: Steinbach
top_news.summary: Margaret Steinbach, fixed income director at Capital Group, and Warren Pierson, co-chief investment officer of the Baird Funds, join Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Real Yield." Junk debt is beating just about everything else in fixed-income markets after surging yields wiped out gains on most other bonds. Yet with high-yield credit spreads near two-decade lows, investor unease is building. (Source: Bloomberg)
